---
title: "Federally Qualified Health Center Service Delivery and Look-Alike Sites"
categories:
  - Facilities
data_description: "List of federally-funded health centers that provide health services."
data_time_frame: "Updated Daily; Current"
data_spatial_scale: "Point"
data_format: "CSV with Address and X/Y"
data_source: "Health Resources & Services Administration (HRSA)"
data_orig_repo: "[Current](https://data.hrsa.gov/data/download)"
data_living_atlas: "N/A"
data_details: |
  Health centers are community-based and consumer-run organizations that serve populations with limited access to health care. These include low-income populations, the uninsured, those with limited English proficiency, migratory and seasonal agricultural workers, individuals and families experiencing homelessness, and those living in public housing.
format:
  html:
    template: ../../assets/data_catalog/data_template.html
---
